construct_verdict_reason: All four items directly measure retrospective and prospective security trajectory assessments at both personal and national levels, with clear semantic alignment to the construct definition.

items.reason: Measures retrospective personal security trajectory (past 12 months), directly aligned with construct.
Measures prospective personal security trajectory (next 12 months), directly aligned with construct.
Measures retrospective national public security trajectory (past 12 months), directly aligned with construct.
Measures prospective national public security trajectory (next 12 months), directly aligned with construct.
